channel.title: News on Kanagawa Institute of Technology, Smart House Research Center
channel.description: Recent content in News on Kanagawa Institute of Technology, Smart House Research Center

item.title: Dr. Sukumal, Dr. Kalika and Prof. Umejima visited KAIT
item.description: Thai National Casecert Univ. Dr. Sukumal, Thai National Electric Computer Technology Research Center Dr. Kalika and Prof. Umejima visited KAIT.

item.title: Mr. 謝群相(Taiwan ETC) and Professor 胡誌麟(Taiwan National Central University) visited us
item.description: On Aug. 20th 2025, Mr. 謝群相(Taiwan ETC) and Professor 胡誌麟(National Central University) visited us

item.title: Report about ENEX2025 Exhibition
item.description: For three days from Wednesday, January 29 to Friday, January 31, 2025, the Smart House Research Center of Kanagawa Institute of Technology exhibited at ENEX2025, held at Tokyo Big Sight, in joint sponsorship with the Echonet Consortium, together with companies that regularly utilize the HEMS Certification Support Center.

item.title: A mutual cooperation and collaboration agreement with the College of Electrical Engineering and Computer Science and the Institute of Energy Engineering at National Central University
item.description: A mutual cooperation and collaboration agreement was concluded with the College of Electrical Engineering and Computer Science and the Institute of Energy Engineering at National Central University.
